person:biography.personal-details:content: Independent researcher, focusing on the unified theory of the universe of matter, basic physics, universal physical formulas and interdisciplinary innovation. Research areas include black hole interpretation, quantum entanglement mechanism, basic quantum energy, geo-moon homogeneous, sun and moon coherence, seismic prediction, photon and electronic nature, electron-targeted lithography, intelligent medical care , the origin of life (the first chicken or the egg paradox), the generator manufacturing technology, the silver-energy-food currency system, and the unified science education system (three steps and nine stages) and the language integration teaching system. 80+ unified theoretical papers have been published on the Zenodo platform, and have been included in the open data platform. Now I have completed the second edition of the industrial-grade industrial-grade, intelligent computing power AI, and software package packaging in the GitHub personal open warehouse. It has been officially completed, the basic framework of global scientific computing power!
